violations.text: The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the bar dishwasher was (0) parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm.Establishment not allowed to sanitize equipment and utensils in dishwasher untiled repaired and/or replaced. Must use 3 bay sink for sanitizing. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (prep table shelves and prep units ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (kitchen, basement, and back outside) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2025
